case_title: THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. DENNIS DEBATTISTA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-31-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-31-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JOANN ADAMS, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT DENNIS DEBATTISTA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO /TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEBATTISTA, DENNIS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,125.99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
